title: dioscorea henryi
intro: Dioscorea henryi, also known as Henry's yam or Chinese yam, is a type of perennial vine native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the adrenal glands and increase the production of cortisol, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies for treating stress and fatigue. The health benefits of Dioscorea henryi include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting the body's natural response to physical and emotional stress. Dioscorea henryi is commonly prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
